title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates Archon, a workflow tool that chains Claude (planning and copy), Gemini 3.5 Flash (UI design), and Opus (integrations and deployment) to build frontends. The multi-provider approach leverages each model's strengths for fast, visually polished applications.
